hooks.command: cat "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/AGENTS.md" 2>/dev/null || cat "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/CLAUDE.md" 2>/dev/null || echo 'No AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md found'

filename=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.filename // ""'); if [ -z "$filename" ] || ! echo "$filename" | grep -q '/'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Screenshot filename must include a directory path (e.g. .state/screenshots/name.png). Root-level screenshots are not allowed.' >&2; exit 1; fi
